title: Department Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with More Retail! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
